how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm.
session_041_completed: TAB DELETE ORPHAN REMOVED — Orphaned _clear_active_tab body (docstring + 3 lines) sitting loose after _switch_tab(new_index) inside _delete_tab. Removed cleanly. canvas_window.py sealed.
WEB SEARCH IMPORT FIXED — duckduckgo_search v8.x changed import. web_search.py had 'from ddgs import DDGS' (x2). Patched both to 'from duckduckgo_search import DDGS'. web_search.py sealed.

_DROP_AS_DOCUMENT TRIPLE DEFINITION — canvas_window.py had three definitions due to Session 040 patching error. Duplicate removal took all three. Method restored correctly at line 312. Single definition confirmed. Sealed.

WORMBOT EXTENSION GATE — _pre_intercept file_pattern narrowed from .py|json|js|css|html|rs|md|sh to .py|js|css|html|rs|sh only. _is_file_drop guard added to block drop notification messages from triggering WormBot. chat_engine.py sealed.

MAIN PAGE DROP ROUTING FIXED — _on_file_drop in main_window.py now gates on extension. CODE_EXTS (.py .js .rs .sh .css .html) → WormBot scan → Ops. All other extensions → canvas._drop_as_document() as Document tab. main_window.py sealed.
session_041_still_open: DROP ZONE STABILITY — drop zone still dies after several drops in some cases. reregister_drop() fires after every drop AND there is a redundant double-registration block at lines 183-185 of scroll_drop.py. May be confusing tkinterdnd2. Needs deeper investigation.

WORMBOT RELATIVE IMPORT ERROR — 'ImportError: attempted relative import with no known parent package' on python and markdown modules. WormBot submodule import structure is broken. Not yet investigated.
JARVIS CVE CLONE — clone Trinity963/cvelistV5 to ~/cvelistV5/ and verify jarvis search works.
GITHUB PREP — README, install instructions, module authoring guide.
files_changed_041: ~/Ethica/ui/canvas_window.py — tab delete orphan removed, _drop_as_document restored (single definition at line 312)
next_session_priorities: 1. DROP ZONE STABILITY — read scroll_drop.py _on_drop full structure. Double-registration at lines 178 and 183-185 may be the cause. sed -n '155,200p' ~/Ethica/ui/scroll_drop.py
2. WORMBOT RELATIVE IMPORT — grep -n 'from \.' ~/Ethica/modules/worm_bot/worm_bot.py — find what is being imported relatively and fix.
4. GITHUB PREP — README, install instructions, module authoring guide.

critical_debug_context.drop_zone_suspect: scroll_drop.py _on_drop has TWO reregister calls after each drop: line 178 (parent.after(200, self.reregister_drop)) AND lines 183-185 (direct drop_target_register calls). Double registration may be exhausting tkinterdnd2 binding slots. Read full _on_drop before patching.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_import_suspect: WormBot fires on .py drops from main page. Error: 'attempted relative import with no known parent package'. WormBot module likely has 'from .something import X' style imports that break when called via modules.execute_tool(). Fix: change relative imports to absolute.
critical_debug_context.requirements_importer_note: CANVAS DROP ONLY. _scan_and_install in canvas_window.py _on_canvas_file_drop is gated to ext=='.py'. Main page drop routes .py to WormBot scan — does NOT run _scan_and_install. This is by design and documented.
critical_debug_context.drop_routing_summary: Main page drop: CODE_EXTS→WormBot→Ops, else→canvas._drop_as_document. Canvas drop: all files→_drop_as_document + .py also runs _scan_and_install.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
Three-place trigger registration: MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers + guard scope
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
lesson_learned_041: Duplicate removal patch took all three _drop_as_document definitions instead of just the two orphans. Root cause: the 'old' string in the replace included the first (correct) definition as its opening. Always verify method count with grep -n 'def method_name' BEFORE and AFTER any removal patch. If count goes to 0 — something went wrong.
philosophy: Session 041 — Bug hunting continued. Drop routing is now clean and intentional. The codebase is more honest about what each drop path does. One missed step (test before seal) cost us a method — caught fast, restored clean. The work is honest. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 041 complete. Drop routing split is the big win. Two open bugs carry forward: drop zone stability and WormBot relative imports. Next instance: read scroll_drop.py _on_drop carefully — the double registration is the likely culprit. ⟁Σ∿∞
